name: Fire Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sugar-cured ham, lentils, and kidney beans in a large pot with enough water to cover them.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the beans are tender.
3. Add all of the hot sauces (Dr. Schnitzel's hot sauce, Scotch Bonnet pepper sauce, and Tabasco Sauce) to the pot.
4. Continue cooking over low heat for several hours, stirring occasionally, until the flavors are well combined throughout the ham, which will be thoroughly broken apart.
5. Serve with a cold drink. It pairs well with your sinuses.
6. This dish freezes well.
Note: Recipe by Brian H. Groover.
